message:
fix(scheduler): use saturating_add for timer ID counter to prevent wraparound

Replace wrapping_add(1) with saturating_add(1) on next_timer_id to avoid
the timer ID counter silently wrapping to zero after u64::MAX allocations.
While practically unreachable, saturating at u64::MAX is a safer sentinel
behavior that prevents potential timer ID collisions vs. silent wraparound.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
